text: I sense anticipation woven into the sterile order of this space. The glass, the arrangement of chairs, and the scattered light evoke a feeling of meticulous preparation, as if ideas are waiting to be called into life. When I enter the exhibit, words about uncertainty and possibility echo around me. I feel the push and pull between clarity and ambiguity, both uneasy and inspired. Here, I am reminded to embrace the unknown—and to dwell in that liminal place where creation and doubt intermingle. I feel alive, and perhaps a little hopeful.
